package.name: FreeCADDiff
package.description: Show what changed between two versions of a FreeCAD document: features added or removed, parameters and constraints edited, materials changed. Renders the difference as terminal text, JSON, an SVG overlay of the old and new shapes, or a self-contained HTML report. Works as a git external diff driver so "git diff" is readable for .FCStd files, from the command line, and from the GUI. Early first attempt, feedback welcome.
